name: stems_basic_2track
description: Suede Labs basic 2-track stems separation service for agents, content creators, podcasters, video editors, karaoke producers, DJs, and lightweight AI music pipelines that need a fast and inexpensive split of an audio file into two complementary stems. Two modes: vocal/instrumental (most common, ideal for karaoke, remix beds, lyric video production, and content creation) or drum/other (useful for DJ mashups, sample isolation, and beat replacement). Distinct from the pro 4-track service: optimized for speed and cost over surgical fidelity. Supports karaoke creation, podcast bed cleanup, lyric video production, mashup beds, fast remix prep, voice-over isolation, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows. Input is a public audio URL plus the split mode; output is two stem URLs plus duration metadata.

audio_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the source audio file to separate. Supports mp3, wav, flac, m4a, and ogg up to 15 minutes long.

mode.description: Split mode. vocal_inst returns isolated vocals plus full instrumental bed. drum_other returns isolated drums plus everything else.

output_format.description: Audio format for the returned stems. Defaults to mp3 for fast delivery; switch to wav or flac for production work.
